name: Imedexsa
message: IMEDEXSA employees achieve professional development through training adapted to individual and collective needs, and IMEDEXSA encourages a spirit of cooperation and respect for all stakeholders involved in IMEDEXSA: customers, employees, suppliers and everyone associated with IMEDEXSA. The implementation of the best design tools and the most advanced manufacturing methods in all IMEDEXSA plants, combined with the high qualifications of our employees, allows us to achieve a production capacity of more than 30,000 tons per year, guaranteeing the highest quality and customized technical support for all IMEDEXSA customers.
